text: Sphere of nothing - fires a sphere that deals damage to all entities within a 3 block radius as it flies.
Rifts - deals damage to entities within a 12 block radius.
Zeroing out - moves player to the save point.
$(o)Condition:$() Taking damage from mobs or players.
Void Seal: 10% chance to gain "Invulnerability" for 20 sec (once per 180 sec).
